=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

强制轮换：开场方式不得与上次相同 import random _available_openings = [o for o in _openings if o != _last_opening] assert _available_openings, "无可用开场方式" this_opening = random.choice(_available_openings) # 叙事身份：不得连续3篇相同（检查最近2篇） ID_DIR = os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/") _recent_identity_file = os.path.join(ID_DIR, "recent_identity.txt") _recent_idents = [] if os.path.exists(_recent_identity_file): with open(_recent_identity_file) as _f: _recent_idents = [l.strip() for l in _f if l.strip()] if _last_identity and _last_identity in _recent_idents[-2:]: _available_idents = [i for i in _identities if i != _last_identity] else: _available_idents = [i for i in _identities if i != _last_identity] assert _available_idents, "无可用叙事身份" this_identity = random.choice(_available_idents) # 任意一层失败 → 函数raise → 任务中止，不发API ```

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

=== 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-...WNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/sf_{os.urandom(4).hex()}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and f not in used_today and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] if not unused: unused = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'
